scripts.dev:app: yarn run compile && electron-builder --config electron-builder.mjs --mac --dir && open "dist/mac-arm64/Dory.app"
scripts.build: yarn --cwd ../web run build && yarn run compile && electron-builder --config electron-builder.mjs
scripts.electron:build:apple: yarn run compile && electron-builder --config electron-builder.mjs --mac --publish never
scripts.electron:build:windows: yarn run compile && electron-builder --config electron-builder.mjs --win --publish never
scripts.electron:build:apple:quick: yarn run compile && SKIP_NOTARIZE=1 electron-builder --config electron-builder.mjs --mac zip
scripts.electron:build:apple:unsigned: yarn run compile && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.mjs --mac --dir
